name: libgssapi-krb5-2
title: libgssapi-krb5-2
summary: MIT Kerberos runtime libraries - krb5 GSS-API Mechanism
description:
MIT Kerberos runtime libraries - krb5 GSS-API Mechanism
Kerberos is a system for authenticating users and services on a network.
Kerberos is a trusted third-party service.  That means that there is a
third party (the Kerberos server) that is trusted by all the entities on
the network (users and services, usually called "principals").
.
This is the MIT reference implementation of Kerberos V5.
.
This package contains the runtime library for the MIT Kerberos
implementation of GSS-API used by applications and Kerberos clients.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libgssapi-krb5-2 because MIT Kerberos runtime libraries - krb5 GSS-API Mechanism.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libgssapi-krb5-2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libgssapi-krb5-2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libgssapi-krb5-2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
